title: Quest Black Travel Kettle with 2 Cups | Portable & Lightweight | Dual Voltage for Worldwide Use | Safety Protection | Use in Caravans, Camp Sites and on Holiday
features: TRAVEL KETTLE – This 0.5 litre small kettle is lightweight & portable, measuring 19cm x 12 x 15cm. This small size makes it easy to fit into bags & suitcases, making it the perfect travel companion for business trips and holidays, as well as camping & caravan trips.

DUAL VOLTAGE – Being further optimised for travelling, this kettle features a dual voltage functionality that easily allows you to switch between 110V to 120V, or 220V to 240V, ensuring you can enjoy a cup of tea wherever you are in the world. The kettle has a UK style Type G plug, so will still need an adaptor to work in other plug sockets.

WATER LEVEL INDICATOR – With a transparent fill window, you can easily see and measure how much water you are putting in the kettle while filling it in order to avoid wastage. In addition, it also comes with an illuminated power indicator and cord storage, adding extra convenience during and after the kettle has been in use.

2 CUPS INCLUDED – As well as a high quality, convenient travel kettle, you will also receive two durable plastic cups with practical handles that match the kettle’s black colour. This ensures you can safely enjoy your hot drinks even when away from home, without having to take a mug with you.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking & cleaning appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the home. From teppanyaki grills & waffle makers, to kettles, irons, & steam cleaners, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Black or White Colour Portable Travel Kettle Enjoy a refreshing cup of tea wherever you travel using this Portable Travel Kettle. With a capacity of 0.5 Litres, it easily fits into bags and suitcases, and includes two plastic cups which can be stored inside the kettle for your convenience. The kettles require 600 watts of power and feature dual voltage functionality, so that it can be used on different electrical systems around the world. Previous page Dual Voltage Kettle The kettle's dual voltage functionality allows you to enjoy cups of tea anywhere in the world. Water Level Indicator The kettle's transparent fill window features an indicator so you know exactly how much water is in. Easy Controls The kettle features simple button controls for turning it on & off, as well as for opening the lid. Compact Travel Size With a 0.5L capacity, the kettle can easily be taken with you in suitcases for use abroad. Two Cups Included Two sturdy, light plastic cups with handles are included for your convenience. Next page 1 Dual Voltage Kettle 2 Water Level Indicator 3 Easy Controls 4 Compact Travel Size 5 Two Cups Included
